title: Spring Real Estate Season Has Arrived in the High Country
excerpt: Spring arrives a little differently in the High Country — the dogwoods bloom later, the fog lifts slowly off the ridge lines, and the real estate market wakes up fast. If you're thinking about buying or selling mountain property in Boone, NC this year, March is the moment to get moving.
image_alt: King Street in downtown Boone NC on a bright spring day with storefronts and pedestrians
